channel.title: Challenges on 112 Revelats
channel.description: Recent content in Challenges on 112 Revelats

item.title: Arrencant el dia
item.description:
Arrencant el dia is the first collective photobook from 112 Revelats. A visual exploration of the moment the day begins, captured through diverse and personal perspectives.

The challenge

The challenge was to capture the moment the day begins. Each participant freely interpreted this moment: from the first light coming through the window to the morning bustle of the street, through twilight landscapes and intimate portraits of dawn.

The submissions were extraordinarily diverse, demonstrating the richness of perspectives that a single theme can generate. The selection process was intense, and choosing the final images was very difficult.

item.title: Retrats Lents (Slow Portraits)
item.description:
Retrats Lents is the second photographic challenge of 112 Revelats. An invitation to slow down your gaze and capture the essence of the subject through time and low light.

The challenge

In a world that moves faster every day, we propose returning to the essence of photography: time. The challenge is to make portraits with a pinhole camera or any long exposure technique that requires slowing down the photographic process.
